backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the full backend for the Thuma Thina platform, including data types and state maps for retailers, products, listings, orders, user profiles, driver/shopper/pickup-point applications, and NomaYini balances, along with all associated business logic endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (restoring frontend hooks, admin pages, and admin dialog components to their Version 53 real-backend implementations) to their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, pages, hooks, and assets in the Thuma Thina frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Thuma Thina Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the application with ThemeProvider, GlobalErrorBoundary, CartProvider, HashRouter, and a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/DangerZone: Admin UI card component that provides a guarded 'Wipe System Data' action requiring the user to type 'WIPE' to confirm, then calls the wipeSystem mutation and prompts logout/reload on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/ListingEdi: Admin dialog component for creating or editing a product listing, with fields for product, retailer, price, stock, and status, wired to useCreateListing and useUpdateListing mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductEdi: A dialog component for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, category (including custom), description, and image URL, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/RetailerEd: A dialog component for creating or editing a retailer, with fields for name, town/suburb, province, address, phone, and email, using React Query mutations and default opening hours.
frontend/src/components/admin/RetailerHo: A UI component for editing a retailer's weekly opening hours schedule, allowing toggling days open/closed and setting open/close times via time inputs.
frontend/src/components/admin/Searchable: A reusable searchable dropdown select component built with a Popover and Command palette, supporting filtering options by text input.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminBootst: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminOnly.t: A wrapper component that renders children only if the current user is authenticated and has admin privileges, showing loading skeletons or access-denied messages otherwise.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthInitial: A full-screen overlay with a spinner that displays during Internet Identity login or actor initialization, hiding once the session is fully established.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, showing a loading spinner during the login process and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile with name, email, and phone fields, saving via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAdmi: A route-guard component that renders children only for authenticated admin users, displaying appropriate error cards for unauthenticated or non-admin users.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAppr: Guards children behind a platform-level approval check; shows a loading spinner while checking and a 'Request Approval' card if the caller is not yet approved.
Guards children behind an approved driver application status; redirects unapproved users to the driver application page with a prompt card.
Guards children behind an approved pickup-point application status; shows a prompt card with a link to apply if not approved.
Guards children behind an approved personal-shopper application status; shows a prompt card with a link to apply if not approved.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Guards children behind Internet Identity authentication; renders a login card with a LoginButton if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/brand/BrandImage: Reusable image component that renders an img tag and falls back to a styled placeholder (logo or hero variant) when the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/errors/GlobalErr: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and unhandled promise rejections, displaying the UnexpectedRuntimeErrorScreen on failure.
frontend/src/components/errors/Unexpecte: Full-page error screen shown when an unhandled runtime error occurs, displaying the error message and buttons to reload or navigate home.
frontend/src/components/shop/cart/CartPr: React context provider managing cart state (add, remove, update, clear) with localStorage persistence using BigInt-safe serialization/deserialization.
frontend/src/components/shop/catalog/use: Custom React hook that manages catalog filtering and sorting state, exposing search, category, and sort controls along with a memoized filtered/sorted product list.
frontend/src/components/shop/CataloguePr: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a future catalogue preview section component.
Site footer displaying the Thuma Thina logo, tagline, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links (including admin and auth-gated links), a cart icon with item count badge, and a login button.
frontend/src/components/shop/ShopLanding: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a future landing page hero section component.
Main layout wrapper that composes ShopHeader, ShopFooter, and conditionally renders ProfileSetupDialog and DefaultTownSetupDialog based on the authenticated user's profile state.
frontend/src/components/towns/DefaultTow: Modal dialog that prompts the user to set a default town by saving a hardcoded town ID (1) to their profile, displayed as a blocking overlay until confirmed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminOrders.ts: Stub hooks for admin order management that return empty data or throw errors, as the backend no longer supports full order management.
frontend/src/hooks/useCatalog.ts: Stub hook for fetching the product catalogue that always returns an empty array, as the backend no longer supports this feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategories.ts: Hooks for reading and creating product categories using a local in-memory list pre-seeded with common grocery categories, without any backend persistence.
Hooks for submitting and retrieving driver applications stored in local in-memory state, also syncing to a shared role applications store.
frontend/src/hooks/useDriverOrders.ts: Stub hook for listing driver-eligible orders that always returns an empty array, as the backend no longer supports this feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnsureDefaultTownO: No-op hook that calls useGetMyTownAssociation but takes no action, as town management is not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useListings.ts: Hooks for CRUD operations on product listings stored in local in-memory state, with React Query cache invalidation for listings and catalogue queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useNomaYini.ts: Stub hooks for NomaYini token balance, transactions, and transfers that return empty data or throw errors, as the backend no longer supports this feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrders.ts: Stub hooks for order creation, listing, and detail retrieval that return empty data or throw errors, as the backend no longer supports full order management.
frontend/src/hooks/usePickupPointApplica: Hooks for submitting and retrieving pickup point applications stored in local in-memory state, also syncing to a shared role applications store.
Stub hooks for pickup point order creation, listing, and detail retrieval that return empty data or throw errors, as the backend no longer supports this feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products using a local in-memory store (no backend integration), with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for user profile management, approval status checks, approval listing, and admin role verification via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetailerPortal.ts: Stub hooks for retailer portal queries (retailer info, inventory, orders) that always return null/empty since the backend no longer supports these methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetailers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on retailers using a local in-memory store, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useRoleApplications.t: Provides React Query hooks for listing and approving/rejecting personal shopper, driver, and pickup point role applications using local in-memory stores.
frontend/src/hooks/useShopperApplication: Provides hooks to fetch and submit the current user's personal shopper application, storing it locally and syncing with the shared role applications store.
frontend/src/hooks/useShopperOrders.ts: Provides React Query hooks for shopper order management; most are stubs returning empty data, except `usePendingOrders` which fetches from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts: Provides a `useWipeSystem` mutation hook that clears all React Query cache; backend wipe logic is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTownMembership.ts: Stub hooks for town membership association queries and mutations that always return null or throw, as the backend no longer supports this feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useTowns.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on towns using a local in-memory store pre-seeded with two default towns, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfiles.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and save the current caller's user profile via the backend actor, with React Query caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a warm earth-tone design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDriversPag: Admin page for reviewing driver applications, displaying them in pending/approved/rejected tabs with approve and reject actions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminManageList: Admin page for managing product listings at retailers, supporting search, add, edit, and delete operations with a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Placeholder admin orders page that displays an alert indicating order management requires a backend update, with no functional order data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPickupPoin: Admin page for reviewing pickup point applications, displaying them in pending/approved/rejected tabs with approve and reject actions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminProductsPa: Admin page for managing the product catalogue with search, add, edit, and delete functionality backed by product hooks and a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRetailersP: Admin page for managing retailers with a searchable table, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via dialogs and confirmation alerts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminSettingsPa: Admin settings page that displays a placeholder card indicating no configurable settings are currently available, wrapped in RequireAdmin.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminShoppersPa: Admin page for reviewing personal shopper applications, with tabbed views for pending, approved, and rejected applications and approve/reject actions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTownApplic: Placeholder admin page for town applications that informs admins that town membership applications are no longer required.
Admin towns management page that displays an alert indicating backend support for town CRUD operations is not yet available.
frontend/src/pages/shop/AdminDashboardPa: Admin dashboard landing page that renders a grid of navigation cards linking to all major admin sections of the platform.
frontend/src/pages/shop/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists cart items with remove/clear options, but shows a checkout-unavailable alert as order placement is not yet supported.
frontend/src/pages/shop/CataloguePage.ts: Product catalogue page with search input and category filter badges, rendering a responsive grid of product cards that navigate to individual product pages.
frontend/src/pages/shop/CheckoutPage.tsx: Placeholder checkout page that displays an unavailability alert and a link back to the cart, as order placement is not yet supported by the backend.
frontend/src/pages/shop/DriverApplicatio: Placeholder page for driver applications that shows a destructive alert indicating the feature is unavailable and links back to the Join Us page.
frontend/src/pages/shop/DriverDashboardP: Placeholder driver dashboard page that displays an unavailability alert and an empty state card for delivery assignments.
frontend/src/pages/shop/JoinUsPage.tsx: Landing page presenting three role options (Personal Shopper, Delivery Driver, Pickup Point) with apply buttons linking to their respective application pages.
frontend/src/pages/shop/MasterAdminRoleA: Placeholder admin page for reviewing role applications that shows an unavailability alert and an empty state, as backend support is not yet available.
frontend/src/pages/shop/MyOrdersPage.tsx: Placeholder order history page that displays an unavailability alert and an empty state card since order data is not yet supported by the backend.
frontend/src/pages/shop/MyTownsPage.tsx: Placeholder page for managing town associations that shows a feature-unavailable alert and an empty state card.
Placeholder order detail page that accepts an orderId prop, displays an unavailability alert, and provides a link back to My Orders.
frontend/src/pages/shop/PickupPointAppli: Placeholder pickup point application page showing a destructive unavailability alert and a link back to the Join Us page.
frontend/src/pages/shop/PickupPointDashb: Placeholder pickup point dashboard that displays an unavailability alert and an empty state for pickup orders.
frontend/src/pages/shop/PickupPointShopC: Pickup point cart page that reads cart items from CartProvider and renders them with remove/clear actions, while showing a checkout-unavailable alert.
Placeholder pickup point catalogue page that shows a catalogue-unavailable alert and an empty product state.
Placeholder pickup point checkout page displaying a destructive unavailability alert and a link back to the pickup point cart.
frontend/src/pages/shop/ProductDetailPag: Product detail page that fetches a product by ID using the useProduct hook and displays its image gallery, name, category, description, and a button to find it at a retailer.
frontend/src/pages/shop/ProvinceListPage: Displays the Thuma Thina community commerce landing page with a list of South African provinces as navigation links, platform feature highlights, and a Nomayini rewards section.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RequestNewProduc: Renders a form allowing users to submit a product request by entering a product name and optional retailer name, showing a confirmation message on submission.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RetailerCatalogP: Shows a specific retailer's product catalog by fetching retailer info, listings, and products, with search filtering and a product grid display.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RetailerDashboar: Placeholder retailer dashboard page that displays an alert indicating the feature is unavailable in the current backend version.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RetailerListPage: Lists retailers filtered by province and town, fetched via useRetailers hook, with clickable cards navigating to each retailer's catalog.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RetailerOrderTra: Placeholder page for retailer order tracking that shows an alert indicating the feature is not yet available in the current backend version.
frontend/src/pages/shop/RoleApplications: Placeholder page for tracking role application status, displaying an alert that the feature is unavailable in the current backend version.
frontend/src/pages/shop/ShopperApplicati: Placeholder page for personal shopper applications that shows a destructive alert indicating applications are unavailable and links back to the Join Us page.
frontend/src/pages/shop/ShopperDashboard: Shopper dashboard with tabs for pending, available, and assigned orders, fetching data via shopper order hooks and displaying order status badges and details in tables.
frontend/src/pages/shop/TownSuburbListPa: Displays a list of towns/suburbs for a given South African province, with each town linking to its retailer list page. Includes a static mapping of provinces to towns and a back-navigation link.
frontend/src/router/HashRouter.tsx: Implements a hash-based client-side router that parses the URL hash, matches route patterns with dynamic segments, and renders the appropriate page component wrapped in auth guards and layout. Covers all shop, admin, driver, shopper, and pickup-point routes.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript types mirroring Motoko backend domain models (towns, retailers, products, listings, users, applications) for use throughout the frontend. Re-exports shared types from the backend interface and adds frontend-only variants.
frontend/src/utils/externalBlobUrl.ts: Provides a helper function to safely extract a display URL from an ExternalBlob instance, returning an empty string on failure.
frontend/src/utils/fileBytes.ts: Exports a utility to convert a File object to a Uint8Array via FileReader, and a validator that checks image file type and size constraints.
frontend/src/utils/money.ts: Provides ZAR (South African Rand) formatting, parsing, and validation utilities that operate on bigint rand values.
frontend/src/utils/productImages.ts: Utility functions for retrieving primary and all images from a product's preferredImage and imageRefs fields, with helpers for URL extraction and image slot availability checks.
frontend/src/utils/publicAssetUrl.ts: Constructs deployment-safe URLs for public static assets by prepending Vite's BASE_URL, ensuring correct paths in both dev and ICP canister environments.
frontend/src/utils/saProvinces.ts: Exports a typed constant array of all nine South African province names.
frontend/src/utils/themeAssets.ts: Centralizes theme asset paths (logo and hero image) for the Thuma Thina app using deployment-safe URLs.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Converts Internet Computer bigint nanosecond timestamps to human-readable date and date-time strings, with a backward-compatible alias.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3), documenting that the app is an e-commerce/delivery platform being rolled back to the stable Version 53 baseline after Version 56 broke the live app, and listing existing features, known issues, and pending orders workflow work.
